# SearXNGSearch

> Searches the web using a self-hosted SearXNG instance. Returns structured results with title, URL, and snippet. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | web |
| Requires network | yes |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | no |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| query | string | yes | - | Search query string |
| max_results | integer | no | 5 | Maximum number of results (default: 5) |
| categories | array[string] | no | - | SearXNG categories (e.g. ["general", "news"]) |
| language | string | no | en | Search language code (default: en) |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "SearXNGSearch"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
